ksa_text: Conduct program reviews and continuous improvement activities, including documenting lessons learned, analyzing feedback results, preparing assessment reports, testing and validating improvements, and auditing programs.

dcwf.top_element_label: Use feedback results (e.g., lesson learned) to identify opportunities to improve collection management efficiency and effectiveness.

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of evaluation and validation principles and practices

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-003 (OP, Task) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.3929 is insufficient to establish relevance to senior-level analytics and business intelligence at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (dcwf=0.393, nice=0.385, ddat=0.383) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.3929 below threshold for moderate fit domain. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does OP-domain KSA OP-T-003 (composite 0.3929) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.3929 for OP domain does not meet the evidentiary bar for ANL IC-level inclusion per DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. External sources confirm this competency is not a standard expectation for Senior Data Analyst at the targeted seniority band.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms OP domain KSA at composite 0.3929 is not a standard requirement for Senior Data Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.3929, domain OP, scope moderate fit. High confidence.
